title: ECIL South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: ECIL South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
ECIL South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Raipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About ECIL South Asia Partners:
ECIL South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ECIL South Asia Partners!
